name: Pork Carnitas
recipeIngredient: 1 each Onion, Medium, Cut in halves
1/3 c Italian Plum Tomatoes (Use 1/2 lb of fresh Italian Plum Tomatoes, finely chopped)
recipeInstructions:
1. See Step 3 for recipe.
2. Roast the Poblano Chiles and peel them.
3. Cut the boneless roast into 2 X 1/4-inch strips. Combine all ingredients in a bowl and marinate for at least 30 minutes.
4. Heat oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Fry pork until browned on all sides, about 8-10 minutes per side.
5. Remove the pork from the skillet and set aside. Increase heat to high and add tomato paste, vinegar, salt, and chopped tomatoes. Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
6. Serve the cooked pork with tortillas and sour cream.
